name: Everforest
author: custom
description: Everforest: Comfortable & Pleasant Color Scheme. 6 variants: Dark Hard/Medium/Soft and Light Hard/Medium/Soft.

settingsSchema.label: Variant
settingsSchema.description: Dark Hard = highest contrast dark, Dark Medium = balanced dark, Dark Soft = softer dark, Light Hard = highest contrast light, Light Medium = balanced light, Light Soft = softer light.
